data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step 'Validate persona scenario #2' aimed to confirm the behavior of the 'Prorated upgrade mid-cycle' scenario. However, the saga run associated with this step has failed, indicating that the necessary conditions to validate the scenario were not met. This failure is evidenced by the overall run status being 'failed', which directly impacts the ability to confirm the expected result of the scenario validation.
gaps: The scenario behavior was not confirmed as supported due to the failure of the saga run.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
